title: Keshav Rai Temple
tagline: Keshav Rai Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Keshav Rai Temple is a popular Hindu temple, situated on the banks of the Chambal River in Keshoraipatan, Rajasthan (India).
overview.description: Keshav Rai Temple is a popular Hindu temple, situated on the banks of the Chambal River in Keshoraipatan, Rajasthan (India). The temple is dedicated to Keshav Rai or Vishnu. It was constructed by Rao Raja Chhatrasal in 1641.

topPlaces.name: Keshoraipatan
topPlaces.description: Keshoraipatan is a city located in bundi district in the state of Rajasthan, India. The town is famous for the temple of Keshav Rai Ji Maharaj or Lord Vishnu which lies on banks of the Chambal River.

topPlaces.name: Sogariya
topPlaces.description: Sogaria is a census town in Kota District in the Indian state of Rajasthan.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Keshav Rai Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Keshav Rai Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Keshav Rai Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kota Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Keshav Rai Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Keshav Rai Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Keshav Rai Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Keshav Rai Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Keshav Rai Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Keshoraipatan, Sogariya.
